name: bougie/bench-magento2
description: Synthetic root for the magento2 solve-phase benchmark. Pins magento/community-edition 2.4.8 (released 2025-04-02), the latest release whose full closure is published as stable on public packagist.org. 2.4.9 carries a transitive constraint on magento/composer ^1.10.2 whose stable release hadn't landed on Packagist when this fixture was captured (only -beta4 was available). No repo.magento.com auth needed either way.
